narrative:
Jackson Township has 2,919 registered voters, with 50.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 37.3 percentage points.
